author: phase-4-coordinator
content:
Added the 7 missing oracle tests flagged in the issue:

stats (3 new): histogram, unique, argsort — histogram handles both Bins::Count and Bins::Edges inputs and checks both the counts and bin_edges outputs. unique handles both the value-only and the with_counts return_counts=true variant. argsort ties are compared via apply-the-permutation-and-check-sorted-values rather than direct index equality, since LAPACK/Rust's tie-breaking may differ from NumPy.

linalg (4 new): eig, eigvals, lstsq, tensordot — eig/eigvals compare only the eigenvalue spectrum (eigenvector signs are implementation-defined) and handle the Complex<f64> return type, checking that the imaginary parts are zero and matching real parts order-independently (since LAPACK's output order isn't guaranteed). tensordot handles both the integer-axes and the [[axes_a], [axes_b]] pair-of-lists forms of the fixture input. lstsq compares the solution vector (rank and residuals depend on the SVD cutoff rule).

18 stats oracle tests (up from 15) + 21 linalg oracle tests (up from 17) all pass. Clippy clean.
